history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A triptych of black and white, grainy film photographs of a young man's profile. Each panel shows the man from the shoulders up, his head turned to the right, looking away from the camera. He has dark, tousled hair with bangs that fall across his forehead. His skin is pale and smooth, with prominent collarbones and a slender neck. The lighting is soft and dramatic, casting subtle shadows that highlight the contours of his face and neck. The background in the left two panels appears to be a dark, textured wall with a faint rectangular shape that might be a window or a door frame. The rightmost panel has a more uniform dark background. The overall mood is introspective, moody, and artistic, with a vintage aesthetic. The color palette is strictly monochromatic, consisting of shades of gray, black, and white. The film grain is noticeable throughout, adding to the retro feel.
